reasoning_content:
I see! The SYsULexer in task 2 is designed to parse the output of task 1 (the token stream), not raw C source code. It reads the token format and converts it back to tokens for parsing.

Looking at the kClangTokens map, it's missing many tokens that I added to the task 1 lexer. I need to add those missing tokens to this map.

action.old_str:
static const std::unordered_map<std::string, size_t> kClangTokens{
  { "eof", antlr4::Token::EOF },
  { "int", kInt },
  { "identifier", kIdentifier },
  { "l_paren", kLeftParen },
  { "r_paren", kRightParen },
  { "return", kReturn },
  { "r_brace", kRightBrace },
  { "l_brace", kLeftBrace },
  { "numeric_constant", kConstant },
  { "semi", kSemi },
  { "equal", kEqual },
  { "plus", kPlus },
  { "minus", kMinus },
  { "comma", kComma },
  { "l_square", kLeftBracket },
  { "r_square", kRightBracket }
};
action.new_str:
static const std::unordered_map<std::string, size_t> kClangTokens{
  { "eof", antlr4::Token::EOF },
  { "int", kInt },
  { "void", kVoid },
  { "return", kReturn },
  { "if", kIf },
  { "else", kElse },
  { "while", kWhile },
  { "for", kFor },
  { "break", kBreak },
  { "continue", kContinue },

  { "l_square", kLeftBracket },
  { "r_square", kRightBracket },
  { "numeric_constant", kConstant },
  { "semi", kSemi },
  { "equal", kEqual },
  { "plus", kPlus },
  { "minus", kMinus },
  { "star", kStar },
  { "slash", kDiv },
  { "comma", kComma },
  { "less", kLess },
  { "greater", kGreater },
  { "less_equal", kLessEqual },
  { "greater_equal", kGreaterEqual },
  { "equal_equal", kEqualEqual },
  { "exclaim_equal", kExclaimEqual },
  { "amp", kAmpersand },
  { "pipe", kPipe },
  { "caret", kCaret },
  { "tilde", kTilde },
  { "question", kQuestion },
  { "colon", kColon },
  { "exclaim", kExclamation },
  { "percent", kPercent },
  { "ampamp", kAmpersandAmpersand },
  { "pipepipe", kPipePipe },
  { "plusplus", kPlusPlus },
  { "minusminus", kMinusMinus },
  { "lessless", kLeftShift },
  { "greatergreater", kRightShift }
};
